series_metadata.series_description: Investagations into probable cause for agents contract termination appeal hearing requests pursuant to Sec. 3905.50

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: In office 2 years after the close of the investigation or a finding of probable cause with transfer to the hearing schedule; then destroy ; Paper: In office 2 years after the close of the investigation or a finding of probable cause with transfer to hearing schedule;hen destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
